etymology.description: 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass") + 合(合) (hé, "combine") = plant or grass with the pronunciation of 合 -> reply
etymology.interpretation: The character 荅 (dá, "reply") combines 艸(艸) (cǎo, "grass") for its semantic component with 合(合) (hé, "combine") as a phonetic guide. Originally, it likely referred to a type of plant and was borrowed phonetically for its meaning of 'reply'.
